title: neoathyrium crenulatoserrulatum
intro: Neoathyrium crenulatoserrulatum, also known as the Himalayan maidenhair, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparation of Neoathyrium crenulatoserrulatum can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
